task: Redesign KudosHashtagField dropdown theo Figma spec 'Dropdown list hashtag' (MoMorph screen p9zO-c4a4x) — dark theme (#00070C), all-hashtags toggle states, IconCheck SVG
acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown hiển thị TẤT CẢ hashtags (không filter selected)
Selected rows có bg rgba(255,234,158,0.20) và IconCheck SVG 24×24
Unselected rows disabled khi đã chọn đủ 5 hashtags
Click toggle: unselected → add, selected → remove
npm run test — 125/130 pass (5 failures pre-existing trong widget-button.test.tsx)
blastRadius: low — UI-only component change, props interface unchanged, no API/DB impact
